name: lucide-animated-frame-icon
title: Animated Frame Icon
author: pqoqubbw
description: Renders the Lucide Frame glyph with source-authored on-demand motion and imperative controls.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file.
Added isAnimated and prefers-reduced-motion guards to imperative and hover animation starts.
Bounded source-authored high-frequency motion to 280ms durations, 80ms delays, and 40ms stagger steps.

license.scope: icons/frame.tsx, lib/utils.ts, and Lucide/Feather-derived SVG geometry

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file. Added isAnimated and prefers-reduced-motion guards to imperative and hover animation starts. Bounded source-authored high-frequency motion to 280ms durations, 80ms delays, and 40ms stagger steps.
modifications.reason: Resolved the bundled utility, added controlled/reduced-motion safety, and bounded high-frequency timing.
